name: FinTV
description: FinTV turns your Jellyfin library into always-on broadcast channels with 30-minute lineup grids, smart scheduling, commercial breaks, channel logos, WeatherStar weather channel, and M3U/XMLTV Live TV integration.
overview: Simulated live TV channels with lineups, commercials, and IPTV streaming

versions.changelog:
- Fix channels and logo sets API failing with JSON circular reference errors
- Fix FinTV tabs and buttons targeting Jellyfin hidden page copies (hide class)
- Fix FinTV admin not initializing on Jellyfin 12 (load admin.js via data-controller)
- Fix FinTV admin.js not loading on Jellyfin 12 (use static script tag and pageshow boot)
- Fix Rebuild All Playouts task failing with missing PlayoutBuilderService DI registration
- Fix FinTV admin buttons binding to a hidden page copy after Jellyfin navigation
- Fix New Channel panel not opening when logo set API call fails
- Fix Binarygeek119 logo set not persisted on first import (broke preset apply with FK error)
- Fix FinTV admin API helper for Jellyfin 12 promise-based ApiClient.ajax
- Fix FinTV admin POST requests sending invalid JSON through ApiClient.ajax
- Fix JavaScript syntax error that prevented FinTV admin.js from loading
- Fix FinTV admin buttons by dynamically loading admin.js on each page show
- Fix FinTV admin page not loading CSS/JS on Jellyfin 12 dashboard
- Fix migration crash from CancellationToken passed as SQL parameter
- Fix SQLite channel number migration when IX_Channels_Number blocks DROP COLUMN
- Bundle Binarygeek119 Set/English logos inside the plugin zip (no GitHub required on first run)
- Play EBS off-air slates with background music when a channel has no scheduled media
- Add Binarygeek119 ready-made channel presets with legacy or subchannel numbering
- Redesign admin UI with lineup editor, presets tab, modals, and toasts
- Support decimal channel numbers (e.g. 1.1–4.3) with SQLite schema migration
- Fix Live TV M3U/XMLTV URLs with anonymous IPTV endpoints and public base URL setting
- Fix GitHub Actions build workflow to target net10.0 for Jellyfin 12
- Add Jellyfin library catalog search for lineup item picker
